ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface ISensor


  • public interface ISensor
    传感器，虚拟传感器，传感器事件，都放这里吧

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int AQI_INDOOR
      indoor Air Quality Index(AQI) 车内 空气质量指数AQI （原adaptApi接口SENSOR_TYPE_AQI_INDOOR） ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_CONTINUOUS Float property type jian2.min@ecarxgroup.com created for project v446k at 2024-12-11 14:48:52
      static int AVG_ENERGY_CONSUMPTION
      Driving info: Average energy consumption of current trip, Unit: kwh/100km 本次行程平均能耗(kwh) 小计里程(trip1)：MIRROR_DRIVER_LEFT 本次里程(trip2)：MIRROR_DRIVER_RIGHT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_MIRROR ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_CONTINUOUS Float property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-22 11:10:32
      static int BATTERY_PERCENTAGE
      Current battery level in percentage, unit: % 当前剩余电量百分比 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_CONTINUOUS Float property type tao.zhan@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-21 15:53:19
